nodes.label: Android xxhdpi Round Launcher Icon (dragit)
nodes.description: Round Android launcher icon at xxhdpi density (~144x144px). Depicts the dragit app logo: a purple/violet arc forming a 'D' shape with three colored dots — purple circles at the top and bottom of the arc, and a red/pink circle centered on the inner vertical stroke — suggesting a stylized letter 'D' or a drag handle motif on a white circular background.
